name: @happyimage/desktop
description: Electron desktop application wrapping HappyImage with native macOS integration.
author: HappyImage

scripts.dev: sh -c 'tsc && (tsc -w --preserveWatchOutput & TSC_PID=$!; electron .; STATUS=$?; kill $TSC_PID 2>/dev/null || true; exit $STATUS)'
scripts.build:unsigned: sh -c 'export CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false; tsc && bash scripts/bundle-deps.sh && electron-builder build --mac'
scripts.build:dir:unsigned: sh -c 'export CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false; tsc && bash scripts/bundle-deps.sh && electron-builder build --mac --dir'
scripts.release: tsc && bash scripts/bundle-deps.sh && electron-builder build --mac --publish always
